Package io.forja.components.overlays.fxDrawer

Class FxDrawer

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
io.forja.components.overlays.fxDrawer.FxDrawer
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxDrawer extends javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
A side-anchored sliding panel rendered on the OverlayHost overlay layer.

FxDrawer is a StackPane containing a translucent scrim and a panel Region anchored to a Side. Opening slides the panel in via a translate transition; closing slides it back out.

Builder usage:

     
      FxDrawer settings = FxDrawer.builder()
          .content(settingsPanel)
          .side(Side.RIGHT)
          .size(320)
          .build();
      settings.open(scene);
See Also:
  • OverlayHost
  • FxDrawer.Builder
